basic_details.short_information: Cochin Shipyard Limited (CSL) Guarantee Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website cochinshipyard.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSL Guarantee Engineer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or Electrical Engineering
qualification.details: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or Electrical Engineering from a recognized University or equivalent. Ex-Indian Navy personnel in the ranks of MCERA/CHERA/MCEAP/CHEAP ranks with a Minimum of 15 years post qualification experience in Operation & Maintenance and Watchkeeping of marine equipment and systems on Indian Naval Surface Ships / Submarines.

content_sections.heading: CSL Guarantee Engineer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CSL Guarantee Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CSL Guarantee Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
CSL Guarantee Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or Electrical Engineering from a recognized University or equivalent. Ex-Indian Navy personnel in the ranks of MCERA/CHERA/MCEAP/CHEAP ranks with a Minimum of 15 years post qualification experience in Operation & Maintenance and Watchkeeping of marine equipment and systems on Indian Naval Surface Ships / Submarines.

content_sections.heading: CSL Guarantee Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
CSL Guarantee Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
CSL Guarantee Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
CSL Guarantee Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for CSL Guarantee Engineer Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: CSL Guarantee Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CSL Guarantee Engineer?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Guarantee Engineer position at Cochin Shipyard is scheduled for 10th July 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Guarantee Engineer post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or Electrical Engineering. Ex-Indian Navy personnel with specific ranks and significant post-qualification experience are also eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Guarantee Engineer post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Guarantee Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 100000 to Rs. 106090, with Rs. 1,00,000/- for the first year.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Guarantee Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Guarantee Engineer position in this recruitment drive by Cochin Shipyard.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. No online application is required.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Guarantee Engineer is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates, along with self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Mumbai, Maharashtra, at the address specified in the official notification. Please refer to the official website for exact venue details.
